code:
# %%
import json
import os
import pandas as pd

print("Recursive file listing under /inputs:")
for root, _, files in os.walk("/inputs"):
    for name in sorted(files):
        print(" -", os.path.join(root, name))

print("\nExpected skipped files when choosing the sample folder:")
print(" - folder_input_demo/ignored/readme.md")
print(" - folder_input_demo/ignored/raw.bin")

# %%
users = pd.read_csv("/inputs/folder_input_demo/users/master.csv")
sales_2024 = pd.read_csv("/inputs/folder_input_demo/sales/2024/summary.csv")
sales_2025 = pd.read_csv("/inputs/folder_input_demo/sales/2025/summary.csv")

sales_2024["year"] = 2024
sales_2025["year"] = 2025

sales = pd.concat([sales_2024, sales_2025], ignore_index=True)
report = sales.merge(users, on="user_id", how="left")

with open("/inputs/folder_input_demo/config/targets.json", "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    config = json.load(f)

print("\nLoaded config:")
print(config)

# %%
book_main = pd.read_excel("/inputs/folder_input_demo/excel/book.xlsx", sheet_name="Main")
unicode_sheet = pd.read_excel("/inputs/folder_input_demo/excel/unicode.xlsx", sheet_name="祝日")

print("\nExcel: book.xlsx / Main")
print(book_main)

print("\nExcel: unicode.xlsx / 祝日")
print(unicode_sheet)

# %%
print("\nJoined report:")
print(report)

summary = (
    report.groupby(["year", "team"])["amount"]
    .sum()
    .reset_index()
    .sort_values(["year", "team"])
)

print("\nSummary by year/team:")
print(summary)
